name: Apple Mac Mini (M4, 2024)
description: The most capable Mac mini ever, redesigned to be dramatically smaller than its predecessor. Powered by the Apple M4 chip with a 10-core CPU and 10-core GPU, the Mac Mini M4 delivers exceptional performance for creative professionals, developers, and home users — all from a 127 × 127 mm footprint you can hold in one hand.

specifications.value: Apple M4 (10-core CPU, 10-core GPU, 16-core Neural Engine)
16 GB unified memory (configurable to 24 GB / 32 GB)
3× Thunderbolt 4 (USB-C), 2× USB-A 3.2 Gen 2, HDMI 2.1, Gigabit Ethernet (10GbE optional)
Up to 3 external displays (2× Thunderbolt + 1× HDMI)
HDMI audio output, 3.5 mm headphone jack with high-impedance support
Idle: 3 W; Max load: approx. 65 W

additionalInfo.value: Apple Inc., One Apple Park Way, Cupertino, CA 95014
Mac mini, USB-C power cable, documentation
Yes — RAM and storage upgradeable at time of purchase

reviews.title: Incredible desktop performance in a tiny box
reviews.reviewText: Replaced a 2021 Intel NUC and the difference in performance is staggering. The M4 handles my software development workflow — Docker, VS Code, Xcode, multiple browser tabs — without breaking a sweat. Nearly silent and barely gets warm.

reviews.title: Best value Mac Apple has ever made
reviews.reviewText: At $599 with 16 GB RAM and M4 performance, this redefines value in the desktop market. I do photo editing, video calls, and light Final Cut work on it and it handles everything instantly. The front USB-C ports are a great quality-of-life addition.

reviews.title: Silent, tiny, insanely powerful
reviews.reviewText: My home office is whisper-quiet now. The Mac Mini sits behind my monitor and I forget it's there — except when I notice how fast everything runs. The ability to drive three displays simultaneously is fantastic for my multi-monitor setup.

reviews.title: Love it, but bring your own peripherals
reviews.reviewText: Performance and size are extraordinary. Just remember there's no keyboard, mouse, or display included — factor that into the total cost. The front USB-C ports are a welcome addition over the previous generation. Would buy again without hesitation.

reviews.title: My old Mac Pro is now gathering dust
reviews.reviewText: I spent $6,000 on a Mac Pro in 2022. This $599 Mac Mini M4 is faster on single-core tasks and competitive on multi-core. Apple Silicon is genuinely astonishing. Bought three — one for home, one for the office, one as a CI build server.
